market_notes: Tech correction holding steady (QQQ -3.4% 1W, SMH -2.7%) with clear flight-to-quality intact: ARM +8.9%, MRVL +7.9%, TSEM +5.1% outperforming while mega-cap growth (MSFT -6.6%, GOOG -8.4%) remains pressured. Semiconductor/networking infrastructure thesis validated by sustained institutional accumulation despite broad selloff. Macro uncertainty elevated (Fed guidance pending, recession risk signals, but enterprise capex resilient). META legal verdict on youth engagement design adds structural headwind to short thesis. Market repricing growth expectations downward but maintaining confidence in AI capex cycle durability—semiconductor equipment, IP licensing, and foundry demand remain structurally bid. Volatility elevated (VIX signal implied) with VolRatio spikes on META (2.02), GOOG (1.27), broader capitulation risk low. No urgency to chase; quality rotation thesis intact, positioning appropriate for uncertain macro environment.

recent_runs.reasoning: Market is in a pronounced tech selloff with SPY down 2.2% WoW and QQQ down 3.4%, yet ARM has outperformed (+8.9% 1W) on quality rotation themes while META shows capitulation (-11.4% 1W, vol ratio 2.02). Risk/reward is asymmetric: ARM's thesis remains intact with strong momentum and relative strength; META's short is now deeply underwater on a panic move. Holding 91% cash with only two tiny positions suggests underdeployment—looking for high-conviction entries in oversold, quality names with catalysts ahead.
